title: 2 Pack 5 Inch Heavy Duty Security Hasp and Staple - Stainless Steel Padlock Hasp for Shed, Gate, Internal Door & Cabinet
features: 【High-Quality Stainless Steel】Our hasp lock is constructed of high-quality stainless steel, which is heat-resistant, scratch-resistant, rust-resistant, and corrosion-resistant.The edges are smooth , so don't worry about scratching your hands

【Padlock Buckle Set】 You will get 2pcs safety padlock buckle set. The padlock buckle size: 159 x 39 mm / 6.2 x 1.5 inch, the lock ring seat size: 45 x 35 mm / 1.7 x 1.4 inch, the material thickness is 2 mm, the installation hole diameter is 5 mm, with 18pcs 17 mm long screws are attached

【Widely Used】Our padlock latch is suitable for various styles of gates, cabinets, drawers, outdoor doors, wooden wickets, windows, and kennels. You can install it wherever you want to provide extra protection for your home

【Easy To Install】Our door gate lock hasp is easy to install, just screw the screws into the desired position and fix it, it only takes a few minutes to complete, helping you save a lot of money Time and effort, very convenient

【Sturdy Door Buckle】Our hasp latch adopts the latest plating and polishing technology to ensure a more beautiful appearance. The material thickness is 2mm, it is strong and stable after installation, and the smooth surface prevents cutting and sawing for added security
description: 【Stainless Steel Hasp Latch】 Safety door padlock hasp latch provides extra protection for your home. The matte black hasp latch is perfect for modern home. 【Easy to install】 First determine where you want to install the door lock latch and mark it. Second install the hasp latch using the supplied fixing screws. 【270 Degrees】 Maximum door hasp latch opening and closing is 270 degrees, suitable for both 180 degree and 90 degree installations. 【Multiple Application】 Suitable for all types of doors, windows, cabinets, wardrobes, drawers, barn, boxes, fence, etc.
